Package glide.api.models.commands.stream

Interface StreamRange

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    StreamRange.IdBound, StreamRange.InfRangeBound
    public interface StreamRange
    Arguments for StreamBaseCommands.xrange(java.lang.String, glide.api.models.commands.stream.StreamRange, glide.api.models.commands.stream.StreamRange) and StreamBaseCommands.xrevrange(java.lang.String, glide.api.models.commands.stream.StreamRange, glide.api.models.commands.stream.StreamRange) to specify the starting and ending range for the stream search by stream ID.
    See Also:
    valkey.io, valkey.io

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface Description
      static class  StreamRange.IdBound
      Stream ID used to specify a range of IDs to search.
      static class  StreamRange.InfRangeBound
      Enumeration representing minimum or maximum stream entry bounds for the range search, to get the first or last stream ID.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static java.lang.String EXCLUSIVE_RANGE_VALKEY_API
      Valkey API character to designate exclusive range bounds
      static java.lang.String MAXIMUM_RANGE_VALKEY_API
      Valkey API string for MAXIMUM entry ID range bounds
      static java.lang.String MINIMUM_RANGE_VALKEY_API
      Valkey API string for MINIMUM entry ID range bounds
      static java.lang.String RANGE_COUNT_VALKEY_API
      Valkey API string to designate COUNT
